title: Bailey Moon "Do Not Vote for Zohran Mamdani / Too Bad I Did Today" Quote-Tweet
about: Bailey Moon "Do Not Vote for Zohran Mamdani / Too Bad I Did Today" Quote-Tweet refers to a viral quote-tweet from Twitter / X user Bailey Moon (@Baileymoon15) in late October 2025, who quoted a tweet reading, "Do not vote for Zohran Mamdani," concerning the 2025 New York City mayoral election, with a selfie, captioned, "Too bad I did today." Moon is seen smiling with her brown hair in a ponytail. The tweet sparked viral discourse and backlash from X users who were opposed to Mamdani's campaign. Mamdani's supporters, and some other onlookers, largely pushed back on the backlash by calling it an overreaction with misogynistic undertones.
origin:
On October 26th, 2025, X[1] user Ben Freeman (@BenMFreeman) tweeted, "Do not vote for Zohran Mamdani," concerning the 2025 NYC mayoral election and Democratic nominee Zohran Mamdani,[2] gaining over 6,000 likes in two days.

Later on that same day, X[3] user Bailey Moon (@Baileymoon15) quote-tweeted Freeman, attaching a photo of herself smiling with the caption, "Too bad I did today." Over two days, the post received over 24.7 million views and 202,000 likes.
